query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.

samples.sample_name: Child Development Center of Natrona County (Region 9)

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the current official Wyoming Department of Education Special Education and IDEA pages on edu.wyoming.gov.

samples.sample_name: Wyoming Department of Education Special Education page
samples.evidence_snippet: The live Special Education page says special education programs provide students with disabilities the support they need to learn and thrive in school and beyond.
The current IDEA page preserves Wyoming’s IDEA application and federal-funds administration lane on the same official WDE host.
The same reviewed page routes families to IDEA, Dispute Resolution, Parent Resources, ASCEND 307, and additional statewide special-education lanes.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 official Wyoming district-owned special-services and special-programs routing pages plus district sitemap evidence.

samples.sample_name: Albany County School District #1 Special Services page
samples.evidence_snippet: The district-owned Special Services page says the department provides specialized instruction and support to students with disabilities and lists Interim Chief Student Advocacy Officer Shelley Hamel with phone 307-721-4460.
The same page says Albany County School District #1 Special Services provides support while adhering to state regulations and guidelines for special education.

samples.sample_name: Campbell County School District #1 Special Programs page
samples.evidence_snippet: The district Special Programs page says Campbell County School District has nearly 400 staff members dedicated to serving students with IEPs and lists the office at 525 W. Lakeway Road, Suite 106, Gillette, WY 82718, phone 307-686-1912.

samples.sample_name: Big Horn County School District #1 special-services sitemap leaf
samples.evidence_snippet: The official district sitemap publishes a live district-owned `https://www.bighorn1.com/page/special-services/` special-services leaf on the current host.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Protection and Advocacy System, Inc. artifact on disk explicitly preserves Wyoming statewide P&A identity on the live first-party domain.

samples.evidence_snippet: Protection and Advocacy System, Inc. | Protecting the Rights of Persons with Disabilities in Wyoming. The Protection and Advocacy System for the State of Wyoming.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the current official Wyoming Department of Education Parent Resources page that routes families to Wyoming parent advocacy organizations.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official WDE Parent Resources page includes a heading reading Wyoming Parent Advocacy Organizations Parent Information Center/Parent Education Network.
The same official page routes families directly to www.wpic.org and preserves the organization address and phone information.

samples.sample_name: Parents Information Center of Wyoming homepage
samples.evidence_snippet: The live first-party site preserves the Parents Information Center of Wyoming identity and special-education support scope linked from the official WDE page.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the official Legal Services Corporation grantee directory and Wyoming program profile.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official LSC grantee page lists Legal Aid of Wyoming, Inc. under Wyoming.

samples.sample_name: LSC Legal Aid of Wyoming program profile
samples.evidence_snippet: The live LSC program-profile page preserves the authoritative Legal Aid of Wyoming, Inc. program record on the official LSC host.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-25 the current official Wyoming Department of Health HCBS contacts pages, county PDF link, and regional early-intervention directory.

samples.sample_name: Wyoming HCBS contacts and important links page
samples.evidence_snippet: The official HCBS contacts page explicitly says `Click below for HCBS Specialists by County`.
The same official contacts page links the public BES-Caseloads-Effective-10.2025.pdf file on the Wyoming health host as the county-routing attachment.
The HCBS landing page tells families applying for developmental-disability waivers to contact their area Benefits and Eligibility Specialist.

samples.sample_name: Wyoming Early Intervention Find A Center page
samples.evidence_snippet: The current Find A Center page tells families to contact the child development center nearest them and publicly lists Region 1 through Region 14 contacts.
